headlines.description: Victor Boniface scored twice for the second consecutive week as Bayer Leverkusen blew Darmstadt 98 away 5-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Boniface scores twice again as five-star Leverkusen crush Darmstadt

video.headline: Boniface opens scoring with stunning solo goal for Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Boniface opens scoring with stunning solo goal for Leverkusen) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayern Munich substitute Mathys Tel headed an 87th minute goal to grab a 2-1 victory at Borussia Moenchengladbach on Saturday and end his side's five-game winless run against the hosts to secure their third victory in three Bundesliga matches.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern strike late to secure third-straight win

video.headline: Mathys Tel heads home late winner for Bayern

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Mathys Tel heads home late winner for Bayern) 2023/09/02 ESHEET
